description_long: This is a classic claw hammer with a straight, elongated handle and a robust, dual-purpose head. The head features a flat striking face on one side for driving nails and a curved claw on the opposite side for prying and removing nails. The handle appears to be made of a single, solid material with a smooth, slightly reflective finish, and it tapers gently towards the end for a comfortable grip. The hammer's head is metallic, with a dark, polished surface that suggests durability and resistance to corrosion. There are no visible markings, logos, or signs of wear, indicating it is either new or well-maintained. The overall design is utilitarian and suitable for a variety of construction or repair tasks in urban environments.
description: A classic claw hammer with a smooth, straight handle and a polished, dual-purpose metal head featuring a striking face and a curved claw. The finish is dark and reflective, with no visible wear or branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the handle and the profile of the hammer head, including the striking face and the curved claw.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow width of the handle and the head, with the claw and striking face aligned and less visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the other profile of the hammer, with the curved claw and striking face clearly defined.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the handle and the back of the hammer head, with the claw and striking face seen edge-on.
attribute_handle_type: Straight plastic handle with a smooth, slightly tapered design and no visible grip enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Claw hammer head with a flat striking face on one side and a curved claw for nail removal on the other, both made of polished steel.
